source.title: PDD Holdings Q1-Q3 2025 and FY2024 Earnings Releases

extractions.claim: PDD revenue breakdown shows transaction services overtaking OMS in Q3 2025, reflecting Temu's growing scale

verification.verifier_notes: All figures directly from PDD Holdings quarterly earnings press releases filed with SEC.

extractions.claim: FY2024 revenue was RMB 393.8B with near-parity between OMS and transaction services
extractions.evidence: FY2024: OMS RMB 197,934M (50.3%) / Transaction Services RMB 195,902M (49.7%). Total RMB 393,836M, up 59% YoY from RMB 247,639M in FY2023.

extractions.claim: Transaction services revenue growth rate has decelerated sharply from 241% in FY2023 to ~6% in Q1 2025
extractions.evidence: Transaction services YoY growth: FY2022->FY2023: 241% (RMB 27.6B to 94.1B). FY2023->FY2024: 108% (94.1B to 195.9B). Q1 2025: 6% YoY. Q2 2025: ~1% YoY. Q3 2025: 10% YoY. This deceleration reflects Temu's maturation and US tariff impacts.

verification.verifier_notes: Growth rates computed from sequential quarterly earnings releases.

extractions.claim: OMS growth also decelerating: from 29% FY2024 to single digits by Q3 2025
